hero.title: Where Math

about.title: About InfoMat
about.subtitle: Who we are
about.description1: InfoMat is a platform dedicated to building applications based on applied mathematics. We combine GIS, optimization, statistics and visualization to deliver real-world solutions.
about.description2: Our mission is to make applied mathematics accessible and practical for businesses, academic institutions and public organizations.

gis.title: GIS Applications
gis.desc: Spatial analysis, interactive maps, geographic modeling and integration of territorial data.

or.title: Operational Research
or.desc: Linear and nonlinear optimization, dynamic programming, graph theory and advanced algorithms.

stats.title: Statistics & Analytics
stats.desc: Statistical modeling, forecasting, data analysis and results visualization.

viz.title: Mathematical Visualization
viz.desc: Interactive graphs, mathematical animations and didactic tools for education.
